parsing_approach: Implements java.util.Properties line rules: '#'/'!' comments, '='/':'/whitespace separators, odd-trailing-backslash line continuations, escaped separator characters in keys. Not a naive split-on-equals.
extracts: one ConfigurationEntry node per key with full (continued) line span
containment edges from the file node
known_limitations: Unicode \uXXXX escapes in values are kept literal, not decoded.
ISO-8859-1 vs UTF-8 encoding nuances are ignored (read as UTF-8 with replacement).
Duplicate keys produce one node id; the last occurrence wins in the node list.
